CY-Bench global insights

Cross-country model comparison and end-of-season vs mid-season walk-forward results.

Research Q1 — Which models perform best across countries?

Rankings are computed per forecast horizon and can be split by crop. Each row is the median NRMSE across countries for the selected crop and horizon (one NRMSE per country; lower is better). Beat baseline % = share of datasets where the model beats average (shown as its own row for reference). Optional Skilful only keeps datasets where the model beats baseline or has R² > 0.

Horizon

Model × country

Median column = median across countries per model (click column headers to sort). Green = better.

Research Q2 — Is end-of-season (nowcast) better than mid-season?

By model (paired eos vs mid)

Detail per crop × country × model

Δ NRMSE = mid-season − end-of-season. Positive ⇒ end-of-season is better (lower error). EOS win % = share of pairs where eos NRMSE < mid NRMSE.
